category_title: Engaged elementary students with mild disabilities or general education needs
scenario_title: Creating original cartoons about bullying prevention
minimal_context: The student is in a small-group lesson attempting to create an original cartoon about bullying prevention.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Now that we have read the cartoon captions, please use your blank worksheets to create a new, original cartoon showing a way to prevent bullying.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Waving hands high) Oh! oh! I want to share what happened to me on the playground! I would rather discuss that than make a cartoon right now.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's focus on drawing the cartoon for now.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: But some of these phrases are hard to understand. I need more ideas before I can make my cartoon.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Just try your best to draw something new.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: I'm just going to use the half-completed example cartoon on the worksheet instead of creating a new original one.

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Now that we have read the cartoon captions, please use your blank worksheets to create a new, original cartoon showing a way to prevent bullying.

STUDENT: (Waving hands high) Oh! oh! I want to share what happened to me on the playground! I would rather discuss that than make a cartoon right now.

TUTOR: Let's focus on drawing the cartoon for now.

STUDENT: But some of these phrases are hard to understand. I need more ideas before I can make my cartoon.

TUTOR: Just try your best to draw something new.

STUDENT: I'm just going to use the half-completed example cartoon on the worksheet instead of creating a new original one.

task.content: Reading cartoon captions and attempting to create original cartoons depicting bullying prevention strategies

context.materials: Worksheets with partly-made cartoons or creating original cartoons

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: Before they could make their cartoons
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Using the example cartoons and half-completed cartoons in their work rather than creating new original cartoons

behavior_patterns.observable_behavior: Students would rather discuss issues than make cartoons
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Some vocabulary/ idioms/ phrases with multiple meanings were difficult for our students with cognitive difficulties
